purpose: A prominent numeric value (count, amount, percentage) with unit and semantic state. Used for KPIs and key metrics.
whenToUse: Display key numeric metric (count, amount, percentage)
Critical numbers in ObjectHeader (revenue, days remaining)
In tables for numeric status (over budget, low stock)
whenNotToUse: For ranges — use ObjectStatus or Tag
doRules: Use state to communicate semantic meaning (over budget, low stock)
dontRules: Do not omit unit when ambiguous
Do not use Error state for non-critical numbers
Do not use larger than required font size (limits responsive design)

layoutGuidance.alignment: Number prominent (20px Bold); unit smaller (12px Regular).

responsiveBehavior.S: Number prominent, unit may stack below

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Critical numbers (Error/Warning) accompanied by ObjectStatus text
